task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sample Order Lines' dataset should be visible in the data elements panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.

task_completion.description: Verify a Parallel Coordinates visualization is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Parallel Coordinates chart (showing multiple vertical axes connected by lines) should be visible on the main canvas, and the visualization type icon in the grammar panel should indicate Parallel Coordinates.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Ship Mode' is set as the Color/Category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grammar panel for the visualization, the 'Ship Mode' data element must be placed in the 'Color' or 'Category' drop zone.

task_completion.description: Verify the Y-Axis values are configured correctly and in order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grammar panel, the 'Sales', 'Quantity' (or 'Quantity Ordered'), 'Discount', and 'Profit' data elements must be placed in the 'Y-Axis' or 'Values' drop zone, in that exact top-to-bottom order.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization title is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title above the visualization on the canvas must read exactly 'Shipping Mode Profile Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application title bar or a save dialog/file explorer should show the workbook saved as 'Shipping_Profile_Analysis' (or 'Shipping_Profile_Analysis.dva').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface (drag-and-drop, clicking menus) rather than terminal commands or scripts creating the .dva file.

integrity.description: Verify the visualization is genuinely rendered by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should be a native Oracle Analytics Desktop rendering with interactive elements visible or implied by the UI, not a static image pasted into a canvas.

integrity.description: Verify the correct application is being used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window must clearly be Oracle Analytics Desktop, not a web browser showing a different BI tool or a generic spreadsheet application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'Shipping_Profile_Analysis.dva' located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\. The visualization must be a Parallel Coordinates chart titled 'Shipping Mode Profile Analysis'. The required columns are 'Ship Mode' (for Color/Category) and 'Sales', 'Quantity' (which maps to 'Quantity Ordered' in the dataset), 'Discount', and 'Profit' (for Y-Axis, in that exact order).
